3) fey ae 6 Boa 565 i Sio

"Then he followed (another way), until, when he reached between two mountains, he found, before (near) them (those two mountains), a people who scarcely understood a word. They said: “O DhulQarnain! Verily! Ya'juj and Ma‘juj (Gog and Magog) are doing great mischief in the land. Shall we then pay you a tribute in order that you might erect a barrier between us and them?” He said: “That (wealth, authority, and power) in which my Lord had established me is better (than your tribute). So help me with strength (of men). I will erect between you and them a barrier.” “Give me pieces (blocks) of iron,” then, when he had filled up the gap between the two mountain-cliffs, he said: “Blow,” till when he had made it (red as) fire, he said: “Bring me molten copper to pour over it,” So they (Ya‘juj and Ma‘juj (Gog and Magog)) were made powerless to scale it or dig through it. (Dhul-Qarnain) said: “This isa mercy from my Lord, but when the Promise of my Lord comes,

154 Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations

He shall level it down to the ground. And the Promise of my Lord is ever true.” And on that Day (i.e. the Day Ya'juj and Ma‘juj (Gog and Magog) will come out), We shall leave them to surge like waves on one another, and the Trumpet will be blown, and We shall collect them all together.’

In the Tafseer of the story of Dhul-Qarnain - that he built the barrier from iron and copper between two mountains - we mentioned that Dhul-Qarnain said, “This is a mercy from my Lord — that through the barrier, this people who spread corruption in the earth are separated from the people.” “But when the Promise of my Lord comes”: this is referring to the time when the barrier will be destroyed and leveled down to the ground. “And the Promise of my Lord is ever true”: i.e, this matter must come to pass. And at that time, Allah “shall leave them to surge like waves on one another,” And then they will go forth among the people, traveling quickly through every mound. After that time, the trumpet will be blown. In another Verse, Allah ¥& said: pe d= ot ro ees Gat 2208 | ae

“Until, when Ya‘jooj and Ma’jooj (Gog and Magog) are let loose (from their barrier), and they swoop down from every mound. And the true promise (Day of Resurrection) shall draw near (of fulfillment). Then (when mankind is resurrected from their graves), you shall see the eyes of the dishelievers fixedly stare in horror’

The Prophet # Foretold Of An Imminent Evil For The Arabs

Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations 155

barrier of Yajooj and Majooj (Gog and Magog).” He # then made a circle with two of his fingers... Zainab & said, “O Messenger of Allah, will we be destroyed while there are the righteous ones among us?” He # said, “Yes, if there is an increase in Al-Khabath (wicked deeds, sins, and hypocrisy).” (Bukhaaree and Muslim)

The Coming Out Of Yajooj And Majooj (Gog And Magog)

Abu Sa’eed Al Khudree + related that he heard the Messenger of Allah #8 say, “An opening will be made for Yajooj and Majooj, (Gog and Magog) and they will come out just as Allah 4% says: “Traveling quickly through every mound”. The people will move, frightened and startled, betaking themselves away from them to their cities and fortresses. And they will bring their livestock along with them. The people of Yajooj and Majooj (Gog and Magog) will wander and drink the water of the earth. One of them will pass by a river and say, ‘There used to be a time when there was water here.’ When every single person will have sought refuge in a city or fortress, one

156 Book of The End: Great Trials and ‘Tribulations

from Yajooj and Majooj will say, ‘These are the inhabitants of the earth, and we have finished with them. There remains the inhabitants of the sky.’ One of them will rock his spear and launch it toward the sky. It will return to them, dyed in blood, as a trial and test. While they are upon that state, Allah will send a disease in their necks, like Naghaf (a kind of worm) of Al-Jaraad, which go into their necks. They will all die, and not a sound will be heard from them. The Muslims will say, ‘Would that a man sells his soul (for Paradise) and goes to see what the enemy has done.’ A man from them takes the task upon himself, seeking reward for his soul (ie. for dying); he thinks that he will indeed die. He will descend, finding them all to be dead, heaped on top of one another. He will call out, “O group of Muslims, Lo! Rejoice! Indeed Allah has saved you from your enemies. They will come out from their cities and fortresses, and they will send their livestock to graze, but they will find no pasture except for their meat (i.e. the meat of Yajooj and Majooj ~ meaning that their corpses will be covering every space of land). Their livestock will find nourishment from them, just as they found nourishment from the best plants they reaped.” (Ahmad) Ton Maajah related it from Younus Ibn Bukair from Muhammad Ibn Ishaaq in a chain that is good.

In the hadith of An-Nawaas Ibn Sam’aan, after he mentioned that “Besa $28 will kill the Dajjaal at the eastern door of Lud, the Prophet 3 said, “While he is upon that state, Allah 3% will inspire to ‘Eesa that, ‘I indeed released slaves of mine, slaves that you do not have the ability to fight. So gather my slaves and take them to the Mountain.’ Allah (then) sends Yajooj and Majooj (Gog and Magog) and they are as Allah says: “Traveling quickly through every mound”. Allah's Prophet, ‘Eesa, and his companions supplicate to Allah, and He will send to them (i.e. to Yajooj and Majooj) An-Naghaf (worms that are in the noses of camels and sheep) in their necks, and then they will fall down dead like the death of a single soul, Ailah’s Prophet, ‘Eesa, and his companions will supplicate to Allah, and He will send birds, who have necks like Bukht (camels with long necks). They will carry them and throw them (the decaying corpses) wherever Allah wills — Ka’ab Al-Ahbaar said: in a place called AlMaihyal at the rising of the sun. Then Allah will send rain that neither a house of dry clay nor of Wabar (literally, hair) will prevent. It will continue for forty days on the earth, leaving it like a Zalafah (mirror, indicating that the entire earth will be washed clean). Then

Book of The End : Great Trials and Tribulations 157

it will be said to the earth, ‘grow your fruits and bring back your blessings.’ At that time, a group will eat from a single pomegranate . and find shade in its shell,” until the Prophet 2 said, “While they are upon that state, Allah will send a good wind, which will take them from underneath their armpits; it will take the soul of every Muslim,” or he said, “every believer. The most evil of people will remain, and they will engage in sexual intercourse out in the open as donkeys do: upon them the Hour will arrive.”

And in the hadith of Ibn Mas’ood that we have hitherto related — regarding the gathering of Muhammad #%, Ibraheem #3, Moosa #%, and ‘Eesa #&, wherein they were discussing the Hour — ‘Eesa 2% said, “As for its time, no one has knowledge thereof except Allah. But from what my Lord ‘Azza Wa-Jall (To Him belongs Might and Majesty) inspired to me is that the Dajaal will come out, and with him he will have two rods. When he sees me, he will melt like lead melts, Allah will destroy him when he sees me. Even a rock and a tree will say, ‘O Muslim, underneath me is a Kaafir (disbeliever), so come and kill him.’ He said, ‘Then Allah ‘Azza wa-Jall (To Him belongs Might and Majesty) will destroy them. Then the people will return to their countries and homelands. At that juncture, Yajooj and Majooj will come out, racing quickly from every land that is elevated; they will lay foot on their countries, destroying everything they come across and drinking all water that they come across. Then people will come, complaining. I will invoke Allah against them (Yajooj and Majooj), and He will destroy them and cause them to die until the earth is filled with their putrid odor. Allah will send rain down; it will sweep away their corpses until it throws them into the sea, And from what my Lord inspired to me is that when. that will happen, the Hour will be like a pregnant woman whose term is due - the people remaining will not know when it will take them by surprise with its birth, during the night or the day.”

3) fey ae 6 Boa 565 i Sio

"Kemudian dia mengikuti (jalan lain), hingga ketika dia mencapai antara dua bukit, dia mendapati di hadapan (dekat) keduanya suatu kaum yang hampir tidak dapat memahami pembicaraan. Mereka berkata: 'Wahai Dzulqarnain! Sesungguhnya Ya'juj dan Ma'juj (Gog dan Magog) sedang membuat kerusakan besar di bumi. Bolehkah kami membayar upeti kepadamu agar engkau membangun sebuah penghalang antara kami dan mereka?' Dia berkata: 'Apa yang telah ditetapkan Tuhanku kepadaku (berupa harta, kekuasaan, dan kekuatan) adalah lebih baik (daripada upeti kalian). Maka bantulah aku dengan kekuatan (tenaga). Aku akan membangun penghalang antara kalian dan mereka.' 'Bawalah kepadaku kepingan-kepingan (potongan) besi,' kemudian ketika dia telah mengisi celah antara dua tebing gunung itu, dia berkata: 'Tiuplah,' hingga ketika telah menjadikannya (merah seperti) api, dia berkata: 'Bawalah tembaga cair agar aku tuangkan di atasnya.' Maka mereka (Ya'juj dan Ma'juj) tidak mampu mendakinya dan tidak mampu menggalinya. (Dzulqarnain) berkata: 'Ini adalah rahmat dari Tuhanku, tetapi apabila janji Tuhanku tiba,

154 Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations

Dia akan meratakannya dengan tanah. Dan janji Tuhanku adalah benar.' Dan pada Hari itu (yakni Hari keluarnya Ya'juj dan Ma'juj), Kami akan membiarkan mereka bergelombang bercampur satu sama lain, dan sangkakala akan ditiup, dan Kami akan mengumpulkan mereka semua bersama-sama."

Dalam Tafsir kisah Dzulqarnain — bahwa dia membangun penghalang dari besi dan tembaga antara dua bukit — kami menyebutkan bahwa Dzulqarnain berkata, "Ini adalah rahmat dari Tuhanku — bahwa melalui penghalang ini, kaum yang menyebarkan kerusakan di bumi dipisahkan dari manusia." "Tetapi apabila janji Tuhanku tiba": ini merujuk pada saat penghalang itu akan dihancurkan dan diratakan dengan tanah. "Dan janji Tuhanku adalah benar": yakni, perkara ini pasti akan terjadi. Dan pada saat itu, Allah "akan membiarkan mereka bergelombang bercampur satu sama lain." Kemudian mereka akan keluar di antara manusia, bergerak cepat melewati setiap dataran tinggi. Setelah itu, sangkakala akan ditiup. Dalam ayat lain, Allah ﷻ berfirman: pe d= ot ro ees Gat 2208 | ae

"Hingga apabila Ya'juj dan Ma'juj dilepaskan (dari penghalang mereka), dan mereka turun dengan cepat dari setiap dataran tinggi. Dan janji yang benar (Hari Kebangkitan) pun akan mendekat (untuk dipenuhi). Maka (ketika manusia dibangkitkan dari kubur mereka), engkau akan melihat mata orang-orang kafir terpaku menatap dengan ngeri."

Nabi ﷺ Meramalkan Akan Datangnya Suatu Kejahatan Bagi Orang-Orang Arab

Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations 155

penghalang Ya'juj dan Ma'juj (Gog dan Magog)." Beliau ﷺ kemudian membuat lingkaran dengan dua jarinya... Zainab radhiyallahu 'anha berkata, "Wahai Rasulullah, apakah kami akan dibinasakan sementara ada orang-orang shalih di antara kami?" Beliau ﷺ bersabda, "Ya, apabila Al-Khabath (perbuatan keji, dosa, dan kemunafikan) semakin meningkat." (Bukhari dan Muslim)

Keluarnya Ya'juj Dan Ma'juj (Gog Dan Magog)

Abu Sa'id Al-Khudri radhiyallahu 'anhu meriwayatkan bahwa dia mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda, "Akan dibukakan jalan bagi Ya'juj dan Ma'juj, dan mereka akan keluar sebagaimana firman Allah ﷻ: 'Bergerak cepat dari setiap dataran tinggi.' Manusia akan bergerak, dipenuhi ketakutan dan kepanikan, berlari menjauh dari mereka ke kota-kota dan benteng-benteng mereka. Dan mereka akan membawa hewan ternak mereka bersama. Kaum Ya'juj dan Ma'juj akan berkeliaran dan meminum air bumi. Salah seorang dari mereka akan melewati sebuah sungai dan berkata, 'Dahulu ada masanya ketika air mengalir di sini.' Ketika setiap orang telah mencari perlindungan di suatu kota atau benteng, salah seorang

156 Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations

dari Ya'juj dan Ma'juj akan berkata, 'Inilah para penghuni bumi, dan kami telah selesai dengan mereka. Yang tersisa adalah para penghuni langit.' Salah seorang dari mereka akan mengguncang tombaknya dan melontarkannya ke langit. Tombak itu akan kembali kepada mereka, berwarna merah darah, sebagai fitnah dan ujian. Ketika mereka dalam keadaan demikian, Allah akan mengirimkan penyakit pada leher mereka, seperti Naghaf (sejenis cacing) pada Al-Jarad, yang masuk ke dalam leher mereka. Mereka semua akan mati, dan tidak ada suara yang terdengar dari mereka. Kaum Muslimin akan berkata, 'Alangkah baiknya jika seseorang mengorbankan dirinya (demi surga) dan pergi melihat apa yang telah dilakukan musuh.' Seorang laki-laki dari mereka mengambil tugas itu atas dirinya, mengharapkan pahala atas jiwanya (yakni karena kematiannya); dia mengira bahwa dirinya memang akan mati. Dia turun, mendapati mereka semua telah mati, bertumpuk satu di atas yang lain. Dia berseru, 'Wahai kelompok Muslimin, bergembiralah! Sesungguhnya Allah telah menyelamatkan kalian dari musuh-musuh kalian.' Mereka akan keluar dari kota-kota dan benteng-benteng mereka, dan mereka akan melepas hewan ternak mereka untuk merumput, tetapi mereka tidak akan menemukan padang rumput kecuali daging mereka (yakni daging Ya'juj dan Ma'juj — yang berarti bangkai-bangkai mereka akan menutupi setiap jengkal tanah). Hewan ternak mereka akan mendapat makanan dari mereka, sebagaimana mereka mendapat makanan dari tanaman terbaik yang mereka tuai." (Ahmad) Ibnu Majah meriwayatkannya dari Yunus Ibn Bukair dari Muhammad Ibn Ishaq dalam sanad yang baik.

Dalam hadith An-Nawwas Ibn Sam'an, setelah dia menyebutkan bahwa "'Eesa alayhissalam akan membunuh Dajjal di pintu timur Lud," Nabi ﷺ bersabda, "Ketika dia dalam keadaan demikian, Allah ﷻ akan mewahyukan kepada 'Eesa bahwa, 'Sesungguhnya Aku telah melepaskan hamba-hamba-Ku, hamba-hamba yang tidak memiliki kemampuan untuk kamu perangi. Maka kumpulkanlah hamba-hamba-Ku dan bawalah mereka ke Gunung.' Allah kemudian mengirimkan Ya'juj dan Ma'juj dan mereka adalah sebagaimana firman Allah: 'Bergerak cepat dari setiap dataran tinggi.' Nabi Allah, 'Eesa, dan para sahabatnya berdoa kepada Allah, dan Dia akan mengirimkan kepada mereka (yakni kepada Ya'juj dan Ma'juj) An-Naghaf (cacing yang ada di hidung unta dan domba) di leher mereka, kemudian mereka akan jatuh mati seperti matinya satu jiwa. Nabi Allah, 'Eesa, dan para sahabatnya akan berdoa kepada Allah, dan Dia akan mengirimkan burung-burung yang memiliki leher seperti Bukht (unta berleher panjang). Mereka akan membawa dan membuang bangkai-bangkai itu ke mana pun Allah menghendaki — Ka'ab Al-Ahbar berkata: ke sebuah tempat yang disebut Al-Maihyal di arah terbit matahari. Kemudian Allah akan menurunkan hujan yang tidak akan dapat ditahan oleh rumah dari tanah kering maupun Wabar (secara harfiah, rambut). Hujan itu akan terus turun selama empat puluh hari di bumi, membuat bumi seperti Zalafah (cermin, menunjukkan bahwa seluruh bumi akan tersapu bersih). Kemudian

Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations 157

akan dikatakan kepada bumi, 'Tumbuhkanlah buah-buahanmu dan kembalikanlah keberkahanmu.' Pada saat itu, sekelompok orang akan makan dari satu buah delima dan berteduh di bawah kulitnya," hingga Nabi ﷺ bersabda, "Ketika mereka dalam keadaan demikian, Allah akan mengirimkan angin yang baik, yang akan mengambil mereka dari bawah ketiak mereka; angin itu akan mengambil jiwa setiap Muslim," atau beliau bersabda, "setiap mukmin. Orang-orang yang paling jahat akan tersisa, dan mereka akan berzina di tempat terbuka seperti keledai: atas mereka itulah Kiamat akan datang."

Dan dalam hadith Ibnu Mas'ud yang telah kami riwayatkan sebelumnya — mengenai berkumpulnya Muhammad ﷺ, Ibrahim alayhissalam, Musa alayhissalam, dan 'Eesa alayhissalam, di mana mereka membahas tentang Kiamat — 'Eesa alayhissalam berkata, "Adapun waktunya, tidak ada yang mengetahuinya kecuali Allah. Namun dari apa yang Tuhanku 'Azza Wa-Jall (Bagi-Nya segala Kemulian dan Keagungan) wahyukan kepadaku adalah bahwa Dajjal akan keluar, dan bersamanya ada dua batang. Ketika dia melihatku, dia akan meleleh seperti timah yang meleleh. Allah akan membinasakannya ketika dia melihatku. Bahkan batu dan pohon akan berkata, 'Wahai Muslim, di bawahku ada seorang Kafir, maka datanglah dan bunuhlah dia.' Dia berkata, 'Kemudian Allah 'Azza wa-Jall (Bagi-Nya segala Kemuliaan dan Keagungan) akan membinasakan mereka. Lalu manusia akan kembali ke negeri dan tanah air mereka. Pada saat itulah Ya'juj dan Ma'juj akan keluar, bergerak cepat dari setiap tanah yang tinggi; mereka akan menginjakkan kaki di negeri-negeri tersebut, menghancurkan segala sesuatu yang mereka lewati dan meminum semua air yang mereka temui. Kemudian manusia akan datang, mengadukan (keadaan mereka). Aku akan berdoa kepada Allah untuk menentang mereka (Ya'juj dan Ma'juj), dan Dia akan membinasakan dan mematikan mereka hingga bumi dipenuhi bau busuk mereka. Allah akan menurunkan hujan; hujan itu akan menyapu bangkai-bangkai mereka hingga melemparkannya ke laut. Dan dari apa yang Tuhanku wahyukan kepadaku adalah bahwa ketika itu terjadi, Kiamat akan seperti seorang wanita hamil yang sudah waktunya melahirkan — orang-orang yang tersisa tidak akan mengetahui kapan Kiamat itu akan tiba-tiba menimpa mereka dengan kelahirannya, pada malam hari atau siang hari."
content_ar: 36 06 ie MA & we BE A a ida 5G ot I SG 0 hls af 8 abt 3) fey ae 6 Boa 565 i Sio "Then he followed (another الطريق), حتى, عندما he reached between two mountains, he found, قبل (near) them (those two mountains), a people who scarcely understood a word. قالوا: “O DhulQarnain! Verily! Ya'juj and Ma‘juj (Gog and Magog) are doing great mischief in the land. Shall we then pay you a tribute in order that you might erect a barrier between us and them?” قال: “That (الثروة, authority, and power) in which my Lord had established me is better (than your tribute). لذا help me with القوة (of men). I will erect between you and them a barrier.” “Give me pieces (blocks) of iron,” then, عندما he had filled up the gap between the two mountain-cliffs, قال: “Blow,” till عندما he had made it (red as) fire, قال: “Bring me molten copper to pour over it,” لذا they (Ya‘juj and Ma‘juj (Gog and Magog)) were made powerless to scale it or dig through it. (Dhul-Qarnain) said: “This عيسى الرحمة from my Lord, but عندما the Promise of my Lord comes, 154 الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations He shall level it down to the ground. And the Promise of my Lord is ever true.” And on that Day (i.e. the Day Ya'juj and Ma‘juj (Gog and Magog) will come out), We shall leave them to surge like waves on بعضهم بعضاً, and the Trumpet will be blown, and We shall collect them all together.’ In the Tafseer of the story of Dhul-Qarnain - that he built the barrier from iron and copper between two mountains - we mentioned that Dhul-Qarnain said, “This is a الرحمة from my Lord — that through the barrier, this people who spread corruption in the earth are separated from the people.” “But عندما the Promise of my Lord comes”: this is referring to the time عندما the barrier will be destroyed and leveled down to the ground. “And the Promise of my Lord is ever true”: i.e, this matter must come to pass. And at that time, الله “shall leave them to surge like waves on بعضهم بعضاً,” And then they will go forth among the people, traveling quickly through every mound. بعد that time, the trumpet will be blown. In another الآية, الله ¥& said: pe d= ot ro ees Gat 2208 | ae “حتى, عندما Ya‘jooj and Ma’jooj (Gog and Magog) are let loose (from their barrier), and they swoop down from every mound. And the true promise (Day of البعث) shall draw near (of fulfillment). Then (عندما mankind is resurrected from their graves), you shall see the eyes of the dishelievers fixedly stare in horror’ النبي ﷺ # Foretold Of An Imminent الشر For The Arabs الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations 155 barrier of Yajooj and Majooj (Gog and Magog).” He # then made a circle with two of his fingers... Zainab & said, “O Messenger of الله, will we be destroyed بينما there are the الصالح ones among us?” He # said, “Yes, إذا there is an increase in Al-Khabath (wicked deeds, الذنوب, and hypocrisy).” (Bukhaaree and مسلم) The Coming Out Of Yajooj And Majooj (Gog And Magog) Abu Sa’eed Al Khudree + related that he heard الرسول ﷺ of الله #8 say, “An opening will be made for Yajooj and Majooj, (Gog and Magog) and they will come out just as الله 4% says: “Traveling quickly through every mound”. The people will move, frightened and startled, betaking themselves away from them to their cities and fortresses. And they will bring their livestock along with them. The people of Yajooj and Majooj (Gog and Magog) will wander and drink the water of the earth. One of them will pass by a river and say, ‘There used to be a time عندما there was water here.’ عندما every single person will have sought refuge in a city or fortress, one 156 الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and ‘Tribulations from Yajooj and Majooj will say, ‘These are the inhabitants of the earth, and we have finished with them. There remains the inhabitants of the sky.’ One of them will rock his spear and launch it toward the sky. It will return to them, dyed in blood, as a الابتلاء and الاختبار. بينما they are upon that state, الله will send a المرض in their necks, like Naghaf (a kind of worm) of Al-Jaraad, which go into their necks. They will all die, and not a sound will be heard from them. The المسلمون will say, ‘Would that a man sells his النفس (for الجنة) and goes to see what the enemy has done.’ A man from them takes the task upon himself, seeking الأجر for his النفس (ie. for dying); he thinks that he will indeed die. He will descend, finding them all to be dead, heaped on top of بعضهم بعضاً. He will call out, “O group of المسلمون, Lo! Rejoice! Indeed الله has saved you from your enemies. They will come out from their cities and fortresses, and they will send their livestock to graze, but they will find no pasture except for their meat (i.e. the meat of Yajooj and Majooj ~ meaning that their corpses will be covering every space of land). Their livestock will find nourishment from them, just as they found nourishment from the best plants they reaped.” (أحمد) Ton Maajah related it from Younus Ibn Bukair from محمد ﷺ Ibn Ishaaq in a chain that is الخير. In the الحديث of An-Nawaas Ibn Sam’aan, بعد ذكر that “Besa $28 will kill the Dajjaal at the eastern door of Lud, النبي ﷺ 3 said, “بينما he is upon that state, الله 3% will inspire to ‘Eesa that, ‘I indeed released slaves of mine, slaves that you do not have the ability to fight. لذا gather my slaves and take them to the Mountain.’ الله (then) sends Yajooj and Majooj (Gog and Magog) and they are as الله says: “Traveling quickly through every mound”. الله's النبي, ‘Eesa, and his الصحابة supplicate to الله, and He will send to them (i.e. to Yajooj and Majooj) An-Naghaf (worms that are in the noses of camels and sheep) in their necks, and then they will fall down dead like the الموت of a single النفس, Ailah’s النبي, ‘Eesa, and his الصحابة will supplicate to الله, and He will send birds, who have necks like Bukht (camels with long necks). They will carry them and throw them (the decaying corpses) wherever الله wills — Ka’ab Al-Ahbaar said: in a place called AlMaihyal at the rising of the sun. Then الله will send rain that neither a house of dry clay nor of Wabar (literally, hair) will prevent. It will continue for forty days on the earth, leaving it like a Zalafah (mirror, indicating that the entire earth will be washed clean). Then الكتاب of The End : Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations 157 it will be said to the earth, ‘grow your fruits and bring back your البركات.’ At that time, a group will eat from a single pomegranate . and find shade in its shell,” حتى النبي ﷺ 2 said, “بينما they are upon that state, الله will send a الخير wind, which will take them from underneath their armpits; it will take the النفس of every مسلم,” or قال, “every المؤمن. The most الشر of people will remain, and they will engage in sexual intercourse out in the open as donkeys do: upon them the Hour will arrive.” And in the الحديث of Ibn Mas’ood that we have hitherto related — فيما يخص the gathering of محمد ﷺ #%, Ibraheem #3, Moosa #%, and ‘Eesa #&, wherein they were discussing the Hour — ‘Eesa 2% said, “أما its time, no one has العلم thereof except الله. But from what my Lord ‘Azza Wa-Jall (To Him belongs Might and Majesty) inspired to me is that the Dajaal will come out, and with him he will have two rods. عندما he sees me, he will melt like lead melts, الله will destroy him عندما he sees me. Even a rock and a tree will say, ‘O مسلم, underneath me is a Kaafir (disbeliever), لذا come and kill him.’ قال, ‘Then الله ‘Azza wa-Jall (To Him belongs Might and Majesty) will destroy them. Then the people will return to their countries and homelands. At that juncture, Yajooj and Majooj will come out, racing quickly from every land that is elevated; they will lay foot on their countries, destroying everything they come across and drinking all water that they come across. Then people will come, complaining. I will invoke الله against them (Yajooj and Majooj), and He will destroy them and cause them to die حتى the earth is filled with their putrid odor. الله will send rain down; it will sweep away their corpses حتى it throws them into the sea, And from what my Lord inspired to me is that عندما. that will happen, the Hour will be like a pregnant woman whose term is due - the people remaining will not know عندما it will take them by surprise with its birth, خلال the night or the day.”
